ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flight_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight data record */,
  "time_utc" REAL /* Time in UTC for the recorded data point */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure reading */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading */,
  "true_airspeed" REAL /* True airspeed of the aircraft */,
  "u_component" REAL /* U-component of wind velocity */,
  "v_component" REAL /* V-component of wind velocity */,
  "w_component" REAL /* W-component of wind velocity */,
  "tedr" REAL /* Total energy dissipation rate */,
  "reynolds_number" REAL /* Reynolds number for flow characterization */,
  "g_latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude at the time of recording */,
  "g_longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude at the time of recording */,
  "g_altitude" REAL /* Geographical altitude at the time of recording */,
  "potential_temperature" REAL /* Potential temperature indicating air stability */,
  "roll_angle" REAL /* Roll angle of the aircraft */,
  "heading" REAL /* Heading direction of the aircraft */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch angle of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption during the flight */,
  "engine_status" TEXT /* Status of the engines */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the flight */,
  "maintenance_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating if maintenance is required */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot */,
  "co_pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-pilot */,
  "flight_phase" TEXT /* Phase of the flight (e.g., takeoff, cruise, landing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_co_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("co_pilot_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model name of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "year_introduced" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft model was introduced */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the aircraft */,
  "total_flight_hours" REAL /* Total hours the aircraft has flown */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "registered_owner" TEXT /* The entity or individual that owns the aircraft */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* The registration number of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft used for the flight */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the flight */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the flight */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin airport code */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination airport code */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., Completed, In Progress) */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot */,
  "co_pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-pilot */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the flight */,
  "cargo_weight" REAL /* Weight of the cargo */,
  "flight_phase" TEXT /* Phase of the flight (e.g., takeoff, cruise, landing) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the flight */,
  "flight_plan" TEXT /* Flight plan details */,
  "flight_route" TEXT /* Flight route details */,
  "flight_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_co_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("co_pilot_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot who reported the issue */,
  "co_pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-pilot who reported the issue */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "maintenance_duration" REAL /* Duration of the maintenance in hours */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* List of parts replaced during maintenance */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_co_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("co_pilot_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Flight Analyst, Engineer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight data record being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES flight_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated flight */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Calculated fuel efficiency for the flight */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed during the flight */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered during the flight */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed achieved during the flight */,
  "min_speed" REAL /* Minimum speed during the flight */,
  "max_altitude" REAL /* Maximum altitude reached during the flight */,
  "min_altitude" REAL /* Minimum altitude during the flight */,
  "max_fuel_consumption" REAL /* Maximum fuel consumption rate */,
  "min_fuel_consumption" REAL /* Minimum fuel consumption rate */,
  "average_fuel_consumption" REAL /* Average fuel consumption rate */,
  "flight_duration" REAL /* Total duration of the flight */,
  "flight_efficiency_score" REAL /* A score indicating the overall efficiency of the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., Warning, Critical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot */,
  "co_pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-pilot */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* Source of the alert (e.g., sensor, manual) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_resolution" TEXT /* Steps taken to resolve the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_co_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("co_pilot_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
